live_benchmarks.description: Live cluster benchmark — sequential requests (concurrency=1), ISL~200 tokens, OSL=256 tokens (128 for Nemotron). Tool: Python openai client with streaming. Routing: Envoy Gateway at 192.168.1.200.

experiments.name: DeepSeek-R1-7B (vLLM)
experiments.notes: DGX Spark spark-02, 1x GB10 GPU. Steady ~43s/req at max_tokens=256, TTFT very consistent after warm-up.

experiments.name: Llama-3.1-8B (SGLang)
experiments.notes: DGX Spark spark-02, 1x GB10 GPU. Slightly higher throughput than DeepSeek-R1 despite SGLang overhead.

experiments.name: Qwen2.5-7B (TensorRT-LLM)
experiments.notes: DGX Spark spark-02, 1x GB10 GPU. TRT-LLM delivers ~2x throughput vs vLLM/SGLang on same hardware.

experiments.name: Nemotron-Super-120B (vLLM)
experiments.notes: DGX Spark spark-01, 1x GB10 GPU, NVFP4 quantization. req 1 had 23s cold TTFT (KV warmup); req 2-3 settled to ~350ms. 15.7 tok/s at max_tokens=128 — strong for a 120B MoE.
